title: Moepack
description: Lightweight modpack with minimap, enhanced mob AI, and high performance
body:
⚙️ Technical Features – MoePack (Fabric)

🗺️ Fabric-Compatible Minimap
Lightweight minimap fully compatible with Fabric, including waypoints and biome data.

👾 Enhanced Mob AI
Improved and more dynamic mob behavior while staying true to vanilla mechanics.

🚀 High-Performance Fabric Optimizations
Uses Fabric-focused performance mods to significantly improve FPS and reduce lag.

🧠 Client-Side Performance Improvements
Optimized CPU and memory usage for smoother gameplay on low- and mid-end PCs.

⚡ Faster Chunk Loading
Reduced stuttering and smoother world loading during exploration.

🔧 Vanilla-Plus Experience
Keeps the original Minecraft feel with quality-of-life improvements.

🖥️ Singleplayer & Multiplayer Ready
Stable and server-friendly when used client-side or on Fabric servers.
